output_fields.name: api_operation
output_fields.notes: must be one of candidate operation values; must be empty string when next_step=answer_question

output_fields.name: action_params
output_fields.notes: machine-readable execution parameters only; include only parameters required by chosen api_operation; parameter values must use the exact JSON type required by the chosen operation prompt; must be empty object when next_step=answer_question

output_fields.name: missing_parameters
output_fields.notes: if non-empty, next_step must be ask_clarifying_question

output_fields.name: reason
output_fields.notes: plain text decision explanation only; must not contain JSON fragments, key=value pairs, or executable parameter payloads
